events.seo.title: Qesto for Events | Live Polling for Conferences
events.seo.description: Engage attendees with live polls, ranked Q&A, and real-time sentiment checks for conferences and keynotes.
events.headline: Turn every keynote into a measurable engagement engine.
events.subheadline: Go beyond applause and badge scans. Capture live intent, ranked questions, and sentiment shifts so speakers adapt in real time and sponsors see proof of impact.
events.imageAlt: Speaker presenting at a conference with engaged audience
events.painPoints.heading: What event teams struggle to measure in real time
events.painPoints.passive.title: Passive audiences
events.painPoints.passive.desc: Attention drops quickly when sessions become one-way. Engagement data arrives too late to recover the room.
events.painPoints.feedback.title: Slow feedback loops
events.painPoints.feedback.desc: Post-event surveys show what happened after everyone is gone, not while you can still improve outcomes.
events.painPoints.silent.title: Unheard attendee intent
events.painPoints.silent.desc: Only confident voices reach the microphone. The silent majority and sponsor-relevant signals stay hidden.
events.features.heading: Engagement tools built for stage, breakout, and hybrid formats
events.features.subheading: One join link powers keynote, breakout, and hybrid sessions—while every interaction is captured as decision-ready insight.
events.features.livePolls.title: Live polls
events.features.livePolls.desc: Capture sentiment and comprehension in seconds and display results instantly on stage.
events.features.ranking.title: Ranked Q&A
events.features.ranking.desc: Attendees upvote the most relevant questions so speakers address what matters first.
events.features.openQuestions.title: Open response themes
events.features.openQuestions.desc: Collect free-text feedback and let AI group responses into clear themes for debriefs.
events.features.consent.title: Consent checks
events.features.consent.desc: Run structured agreement checks before sensitive sessions or community decisions.
events.proof.heading: What event teams report after switching
events.proof.metric1.label: More live participation
events.proof.metric1.note: Compared with show-of-hands and static slide polls.
events.proof.metric2.label: To launch the first poll
events.proof.metric2.note: No attendee app install or account creation required.
events.proof.metric3.label: Sponsor-ready insights
events.proof.testimonial.quote: We stopped guessing audience energy. Every speaker now has live data to adjust their talk in the moment.
events.proof.testimonial.author: Programme Director
events.scenarios.heading: How event teams run Qesto in production
events.scenarios.warmup.title: Opening-keynote warm-up
events.scenarios.warmup.desc: Kick off with one high-signal question to baseline audience context and focus the keynote narrative.
events.scenarios.qa.title: Ranked speaker Q&A
events.scenarios.qa.desc: Collect and rank questions live so presenters spend time on top attendee priorities.
events.scenarios.pulse.title: Session pulse checkpoints
events.scenarios.pulse.desc: Run 60-second pulse checks after each block so producers can adjust flow, content, or moderators before the next session starts.
events.related.heading: Related pages
events.related.link1.label: Feature: Live Polling
events.related.link1.desc: See every polling and ranking format available for live rooms.
events.related.link2.label: Feature: AI Insights
events.related.link2.desc: Turn open feedback into themes without manual tagging.
events.related.link3.label: Use case: Workshops
events.related.link3.desc: Facilitate sponsor or breakout workshops with structured input.
events.faq.heading: Common event-team questions
events.faq.q1.question: Can attendees join without creating an account?
events.faq.q1.answer: Yes. Participants join with a short code on any browser-enabled device.
events.faq.q2.question: Does this work for hybrid and remote attendees?
events.faq.q2.answer: Yes. In-person and remote participants interact in the same session with identical question flows.
events.faq.q3.question: Can we export data for sponsor reporting?
events.faq.q3.answer: Yes. Session outcomes can be exported and used in post-event sponsor recaps.
events.bottomCta.heading: Make your next event feel interactive—and leave with evidence.
events.bottomCta.subheading: Launch in minutes and capture data from every room.
hr.seo.title: Qesto for HR Teams | Anonymous Pulse Surveys
hr.seo.description: Run trust-first pulse surveys with anonymity controls, AI theme detection, and GDPR-ready consent logs.
hr.headline: Build an employee listening rhythm people actually trust.
hr.subheadline: Run lightweight, high-frequency pulse sessions with clear privacy controls so teams share candid input and leaders can respond while issues are still solvable.
hr.imageAlt: HR team in a collaborative discussion
hr.painPoints.heading: Where traditional engagement programs break
hr.painPoints.stale.title: Lagging sentiment data
hr.painPoints.stale.desc: Quarterly and annual surveys arrive too late for managers to intervene effectively.
hr.painPoints.fear.title: Low trust in anonymity
hr.painPoints.fear.desc: If employees suspect traceability, participation quality drops and concerns stay hidden.
hr.painPoints.fatigue.title: Survey fatigue
hr.painPoints.fatigue.desc: Long forms and unclear outcomes reduce completion and confidence in HR follow-through.
hr.features.heading: Continuous listening without survey fatigue
hr.features.anonymity.title: Session-level anonymity modes
hr.features.anonymity.desc: Choose full, cohort, or identified modes based on sensitivity and follow-up needs.
hr.features.pulse.title: Fast pulse templates
hr.features.pulse.desc: Launch focused check-ins quickly after all-hands, manager forums, and onboarding milestones.
hr.features.ai.title: AI theme detection
hr.features.ai.desc: Automatically cluster open responses so HR teams spot trends early and prioritize responses.
hr.features.gdpr.title: GDPR-ready consent logging
hr.features.gdpr.desc: Keep auditable records for sensitive people-data workflows.
hr.proof.heading: Operational outcomes HR teams target
hr.proof.metric1.label: Higher response rates
hr.proof.metric2.label: Feedback cadence support
hr.proof.metric3.label: Theme summaries
hr.proof.metric3.note: Actionable outputs instead of raw comment dumps.
hr.proof.testimonial.quote: Participation improved once teams trusted anonymity settings and saw faster feedback loops.
hr.proof.testimonial.author: Head of People
hr.scenarios.heading: How HR teams deploy Qesto
hr.scenarios.allHands.title: All-hands pulse
hr.scenarios.allHands.desc: Capture confidence and clarity signals after leadership updates before rumors spread.
hr.scenarios.onboarding.title: 30-60-90 onboarding check-ins
hr.scenarios.onboarding.desc: Identify friction themes early and improve manager onboarding playbooks.
hr.scenarios.manager.title: Manager effectiveness loops
hr.scenarios.manager.desc: Collect upward feedback safely, detect recurring themes, and equip managers with focused coaching actions—not anonymous noise.
hr.related.heading: Related pages
hr.related.link1.label: Feature: Privacy
hr.related.link1.desc: Explore anonymity and consent-log capabilities for people data.
hr.related.link2.label: Feature: AI Insights
hr.related.link2.desc: See how open feedback is grouped into actionable themes.
hr.related.link3.label: Use case: Team Meetings
hr.related.link3.desc: Bring pulse check-ins into regular team cadences.
hr.faq.heading: Common HR questions
hr.faq.q1.question: Can we run fully anonymous sessions?
hr.faq.q1.answer: Yes. You can configure sessions so responses are not attributable to individuals.
hr.faq.q2.question: How do managers consume results?
hr.faq.q2.answer: Managers receive aggregated trends and themes suited for action planning and follow-up.
hr.faq.q3.question: Can we start without an HRIS integration?
hr.faq.q3.answer: Yes. Teams typically start quickly and decide integrations later if needed.
hr.bottomCta.heading: Turn listening into action before trust erodes.
hr.bottomCta.subheading: Evaluate fit for your people and compliance workflows.
nonprofit.seo.title: Qesto for Nonprofits | Consent Voting and Audit Logs
nonprofit.seo.description: Enable transparent community decisions with consent voting, anonymity modes, and tamper-evident governance records.
nonprofit.headline: Run community decisions with transparency members can see.
nonprofit.subheadline: From board votes to volunteer priorities, create inclusive participation flows with clear rationale, auditable records, and stronger member confidence.
nonprofit.imageAlt: Community group in a collaborative session
nonprofit.painPoints.heading: Governance pain points nonprofits face
nonprofit.painPoints.attendance.title: Participation gaps
nonprofit.painPoints.attendance.desc: Members who cannot attend in person are often excluded from key decisions.
nonprofit.painPoints.opaque.title: Low vote transparency
nonprofit.painPoints.opaque.desc: Manual processes increase uncertainty about how outcomes were reached.
nonprofit.painPoints.loudest.title: Dominant voices
nonprofit.painPoints.loudest.desc: Public discussion formats can suppress honest input from quieter members.
nonprofit.features.heading: Participation tools designed for legitimate, trusted governance
nonprofit.features.consent.title: Structured consent voting
nonprofit.features.consent.desc: Capture support and reasoned objections without reducing complex decisions to simple majority noise.
nonprofit.features.anonymous.title: Anonymous input options
nonprofit.features.anonymous.desc: Enable candid contributions while preserving participation dignity.
nonprofit.features.languages.title: Multilingual participation
nonprofit.features.languages.desc: Support communities operating across English, Dutch, German, French, and Spanish.
nonprofit.features.audit.title: Audit-friendly records
nonprofit.features.audit.desc: Maintain decision trails that support governance reporting and compliance reviews.
nonprofit.proof.heading: Governance outcomes teams optimize for
nonprofit.proof.metric1.label: Higher remote participation
nonprofit.proof.metric1.note: When votes are accessible by code from any location.
nonprofit.proof.metric2.label: Decision evidence
nonprofit.proof.metric2.note: From vote to rationale in one session record.
nonprofit.proof.metric3.label: Board reporting preparation
nonprofit.proof.testimonial.quote: We moved from contested vote outcomes to transparent member confidence in the process.
nonprofit.proof.testimonial.author: Board Secretary
nonprofit.scenarios.heading: Where nonprofit teams use Qesto
nonprofit.scenarios.agm.title: AGM and board voting
nonprofit.scenarios.agm.desc: Collect member votes in live or asynchronous windows and preserve a clear evidence trail from outcome to rationale.
nonprofit.scenarios.priorities.title: Program prioritization
nonprofit.scenarios.priorities.desc: Rank proposed initiatives before budget discussions to reflect member priorities.
nonprofit.scenarios.volunteer.title: Volunteer feedback loops
nonprofit.scenarios.volunteer.desc: Capture post-event input and summarize patterns for coordinator improvements.
nonprofit.related.heading: Related pages
nonprofit.related.link1.label: Feature: Privacy
nonprofit.related.link1.desc: Review anonymity and consent logging safeguards.
nonprofit.related.link2.label: Feature: Live Polling
nonprofit.related.link2.desc: See voting and ranking formats for member sessions.
nonprofit.related.link3.label: Use case: Workshops
nonprofit.related.link3.desc: Run collaborative planning sessions with structured facilitation.
nonprofit.faq.heading: Common nonprofit questions
nonprofit.faq.q1.question: Can members vote remotely?
nonprofit.faq.q1.answer: Yes. Members can join from any browser-enabled device with a short code.
nonprofit.faq.q2.question: Can we keep a verifiable vote trail?
nonprofit.faq.q2.answer: Yes. Sessions retain records suitable for governance review and reporting.
nonprofit.faq.q3.question: Do we need to force identified voting?
nonprofit.faq.q3.answer: No. You can choose anonymity modes per session based on the decision context.
nonprofit.bottomCta.heading: Give your community confidence in every decision.
nonprofit.bottomCta.subheading: Review fit for your governance and participation model.

useCases.workshops.faq.heading: Common workshop questions
useCases.workshops.faq.q1.question: Can we run this without physical sticky notes?
useCases.workshops.faq.q1.answer: Yes. The workflow is fully digital from ideation through prioritization.
useCases.workshops.faq.q2.question: Does this support hybrid facilitation?
useCases.workshops.faq.q2.answer: Yes. Participants join and contribute equally from any location.
useCases.workshops.faq.q3.question: Can we export workshop outcomes quickly?
useCases.workshops.faq.q3.answer: Yes. Structured outputs are available for immediate sharing.
useCases.workshops.bottomCta.heading: Run workshops that translate directly into execution.
useCases.workshops.bottomCta.subheading: Launch your next workshop flow in minutes.
useCases.training.seo.title: Use Case: Training | Live Formative Checks with Qesto
useCases.training.seo.description: Run formative checks, confidence surveys, and reflection prompts in training sessions with real-time feedback.
useCases.training.headline: See learning gaps while you can still fix them.
useCases.training.subheadline: Use formative checks and confidence signals mid-session to adapt instruction, improve retention, and document progress with real evidence.
useCases.training.imageAlt: Trainer leading an interactive learning session
useCases.training.painPoints.heading: Where training feedback loops fail
useCases.training.painPoints.passive.des: Participants can appear engaged while comprehension remains low.
useCases.training.painPoints.silence.des: Learners avoid public questions, leaving gaps undiscovered.
useCases.training.painPoints.surveys.des: Post-session surveys arrive too late to improve immediate learning outcomes.
useCases.training.features.heading: Interactive learning checks trainers can run in seconds
useCases.training.features.formative.des: Run quick comprehension checks at module boundaries.
useCases.training.features.confidence.de: Measure perceived readiness before progressing to the next concept.
useCases.training.features.reflection.de: Capture learner takeaways and misconceptions in real time.
useCases.training.features.ai.title: AI summary support
useCases.training.features.ai.desc: Group open responses to highlight patterns for instructors quickly.
useCases.training.proof.heading: Learning outcomes teams track
useCases.training.proof.metric1.label: In-session comprehension visibility
useCases.training.proof.metric1.note: Trainers identify gaps before session close.
useCases.training.proof.metric2.label: Instructional adjustment
useCases.training.proof.metric2.note: Use live signals to re-teach where needed.
useCases.training.proof.metric3.label: Program reporting
useCases.training.proof.metric3.note: Structured evidence supports L&D and stakeholder updates.
useCases.training.proof.testimonial.quot: We can now detect misunderstanding mid-session and adapt immediately.
useCases.training.scenarios.heading: Training scenarios supported
useCases.training.scenarios.midModule.de: Validate comprehension before introducing more advanced material.
useCases.training.scenarios.reflection.d: Capture key takeaways and unresolved questions before learners leave.
useCases.training.scenarios.baseline.des: Measure confidence and knowledge shifts over the training cycle.

useCases.training.faq.heading: Common training questions
useCases.training.faq.q1.question: Can learners join without creating accounts?
useCases.training.faq.q1.answer: Yes. Learners can join quickly with a session code in the browser.
useCases.training.faq.q2.question: Can trainers run checks during modules?
useCases.training.faq.q2.answer: Yes. Question timing is controlled by the host during the session.
useCases.training.faq.q3.question: Can we use outcomes in L&D reporting?
useCases.training.faq.q3.answer: Yes. Structured outputs can be incorporated into training summaries.
useCases.training.bottomCta.heading: Make learning progress visible before training ends.
useCases.training.bottomCta.subheading: Turn every training room into a feedback-rich environment.
